name: Confetti Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 can Buttermilk or Country-Style refrigerator biscuits (10 in tin)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine.
2. Add the rest of the ingredients, except the biscuits. Mix well.
3. Separate the dough into 10 portions.
4. Cut each portion into quarters.
5. Roll the quarters into the cheese mixture and place them in a greased 8-inch cake pan.
6. Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes.
